description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a lush green lawn and mature trees, with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, modern facade with multiple large windows and several exterior doors. The front yard is open and spacious, while the backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and bordered by dense foliage, providing privacy. The house includes a visible garage or carport area, and the landscaping is well-maintained with trimmed bushes and a mix of deciduous trees. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade. The overall design is practical and inviting, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious yard surrounded by trees and a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a well-manicured lawn with several trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, wooden fence, and more densely arranged trees providing privacy.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the garage/carport area, additional doors, and thick greenery along the boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side of the bungalow, with more open lawn and fewer trees.
